name: bastion-tower-defense
description: Bastion — a self-contained HTML5 tower-defense game, packaged for web (PWA) and native iOS/Android via Capacitor.

scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:release: npm run build && node tools/set-ads-live.mjs && npx cap sync android
scripts.add:ios: npm run build && npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios
scripts.add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && node tools/patch-android-admob.mjs
